positive: A stylized, intricate abstract jungle scene featuring giant emerald foliage, bioluminescent mushrooms, and stylized, geometric jaguar paw prints. The composition is highly symmetrical, centering the largest leaves for maximum impact. Use a palette of deep jungle emerald green, vibrant teal, neon turquoise, and rich jungle black. Style should be a modern, psychedelic linocut print with crisp black outlines and negative space. Lighting should be dramatic and high-contrast, emphasizing silhouettes and glow effects. Suitable for central placement on apparel.
